changelog: Fix: Exclude Windows junction points from default backup paths (Documents and Settings, Application Data, Local Settings, My Documents, etc.) — prevents file sizes being counted 2x causing inflated totals
Fix: 'Clear Stale Jobs' now uses inline confirm instead of window.confirm (blocked on HTTPS); shows result inline instead of alert()
Fix: Cancel backup waits 1.5s for UrBackup to remove job before refreshing activity list
